summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ventura Fresh Laundry CRM with new features. Backend API tests achieved 100% success rate (40/40 tests passed). Frontend testing successful for landing page, admin panel, calendar, and settings. All public form endpoints working correctly with proper integration to admin dashboard. CSV export functionality working. Minor issue with landing page link from admin.

integration_issues.issue: Landing page link from admin sidebar may not redirect properly
integration_issues.symptoms: Timeout when clicking landing page link from admin - may be navigation timing issue

passed_tests: Lead management (create, update, convert to customer)
Public pickup request form (no auth required)
Calendar API endpoints with date filtering
CSV export for all data types (customers, orders, quotes, leads, tickets)
Frontend landing page at /home with hero, services, how it works sections
Calendar page loads with date picker and status legend
Settings page loads with notification status and export buttons
CSV export buttons trigger file downloads successfully
Navigation between admin pages (Dashboard, Calendar, Settings)
Dashboard shows updated stats from public form submissions
Spanish UI implementation throughout admin panel
Integration between public forms and admin dashboard data
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Investigate landing page link navigation from admin sidebar - may need to ensure proper routing or add target='_blank' for external navigation. All core functionality working correctly.
